expectations.text: Produces exactly one event (short overnight correctly detected)
expectations.evidence: Produces 3 events (outbound flight, layover, return flight) — overnight not collapsed to single event

expectations.text: Event title matches format: 'E3180A · 2055 MSP → 0746 MSP'
expectations.evidence: Titles are 'E3180A — MSP→GRB (SkyWest 4003)', 'Layover — Lodge Kohler (GRB)', 'E3180A — GRB→MSP (SkyWest 4140)' — wrong format, wrong separator, wrong airline prefix

expectations.text: Notes header says 'Overnight (2 days)' not 'Day 1 of 2'
expectations.evidence: No overnight header — events split into individual legs with per-leg notes

expectations.text: Both legs appear in notes: DL4003 MSP → GRB and DL4140 GRB → MSP
expectations.evidence: Legs split into separate events rather than combined in one event's notes. Uses 'SKW4003' not 'DL4003'

expectations.text: RON hotel (Lodge Kohler, Green Bay WI) included in notes
expectations.evidence: Hotel is its own separate calendar event rather than a notes field on the duty event

expectations.text: Start time reflects report (2055 Jun 7), end time reflects release (0746 Jun 8)
expectations.evidence: No single event spans 2055 Jun 7 → 0746 Jun 8; events split across outbound/layover/return
